typography.font_instructions: Use Outfit for all headings, emphasizing bold geometric tech aesthetic. Use Manrope for body text, providing excellent legibility and a premium structured feel.

colors.instructions: Strictly adhere to the dark theme. NEVER use pure #000000. Tint backgrounds with a warm/copper undertone to match the brand. Use #E8592F as the primary kinetic trigger. Keep UI mostly monochrome/dark and use copper sparingly for focus/active states.

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use high-end glass for floating elements like sticky navs: bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10. NO PURE TRANSPARENT BACKGROUNDS on elements over content.
visual_enhancers.neumorphism_tactile: For dashboard widgets: flat background matching parent, 1px subtle border, no heavy box shadows. Rely on crisp edges.
visual_enhancers.textures: Add subtle grain/noise overlays to large empty spaces or hero backgrounds to avoid the 'digital flat' look.
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid strokes or 2px 'Inner Glow' highlights using border-white/5 or border-[#E8592F]/20.

grids_and_layouts.dashboard_grid: Bento Grid Protocol: Base grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Gap-6. Cardless or sharp edges with 1px border. Every pixel utilized. H-full on children.
grids_and_layouts.marketing_grid: The 'Tetris' Grid: Asymmetry, Visual Tension. grid-cols-12, wide gap-8 to gap-12. Overlap elements intentionally.
grids_and_layouts.spacing: Generous Spacing Philosophy: p-6, p-8, p-12. Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-6 or p-8).

motion.hover_states: Hover states must be a lighter hue of the active state. Add slight lift (-translate-y-1).
motion.transitions: Use specific transition properties. Exclude transforms from universal transitions.
motion.page_transitions: Staggered entrance animations for list items. Smooth state changes.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure 4.5:1 ratio for normal text. Use APCA calculator guidelines.
accessibility.data_testid: CRITICAL: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case. Example: data-testid='paint-shop-color-btn'.
accessibility.focus: Focus states must have HIGHER contrast, e.g., focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#E8592F].

images_urls.description: Woman working at a food truck at night - highly atmospheric and cinematic for landing page.
Chef with stainless steel spoon in dark kitchen. Great for the equipment showroom or kitchen builder module.
Gourmet appetizers arranged on a dark background. Premium food plating.

media_and_images.guidelines: Use images as cinematic backgrounds with overlay gradients for text readability. Do not use generic stock.

components.paint_shop_configurator: Split-view design. Left side: large truck canvas on pure black background with mix-blend-mode coloring. Right side: Control panel tabs (Color, Wrap, Accessories) using glassmorphism or deep dark cards. Must feel like a premium configurator.
components.dashboard_modules: Hub for 14+ feature modules. Organized by phase. Cardless or minimal 1px borders. Sharp UI.
components.auth: Dark theme Google Auth login and Stripe pricing components.

instructions_to_main_agent: You have .js files not .tsx files. Build React components in .js/.jsx.
Do not use transparent backgrounds for headers/dropdowns. Use bg-[#1a1714] or bg-black/80 with backdrop-blur.
Do not use generic centralized layouts. Avoid default Vercel/Stripe looks.
Strictly follow the color palette. #E8592F is the primary accent. Use dark mode exclusively.
Implement the Paint Shop truck configurator with high-end premium aesthetic. The canvas must use mix-blend-mode effectively on black background.
Use named exports for components, default exports for pages.
universal_guidelines: Do not converge toward generic outputs.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Do not apply universal transitions (`transition: all`). Apply transitions strictly to interactive elements.
DO NOT center align the app container. No `.App { text-align: center; }`.
Always use modern pill-shaped or sharp buttons.
Never use AI assistant emoji characters for icons.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Prioritize pre-existing Shadcn components from src/components/ui.
Add data-testid attributes to all interactive elements.
